title: Kinn@rowth #3672
definition:
Chinneroth or Cinneroth or Chinnereth = "harps"

 1) the early name of the Sea of Galilee
 2) a town and district in Naphtali near the Sea of Galilee
nasbUsage:
Definition: Chinneroth or Cinneroth or Chinnereth = "harps"

 1) the early name of the Sea of Galilee
 2) a town and district in Naphtali near the Sea of Galilee

    NASB:  a city in Galilee, also a lake near the city
